meta.purpose: Capability stages for KDNA authoring — from template filler to domain architect. Used to guide agent and user growth in authoring skill.
meta.load_condition: Load when the user or agent asks about improving KDNA authoring skills, or when evaluating an authoring session's maturity level.

stages.name: Template Filler
stages.description: Fills KDNA JSON fields with content directly from the user's initial description without extracting distinctions. Produces structurally valid but behaviorally hollow domains.
indicators: Axioms are generic slogans under 50 characters
Misunderstandings are straw men no agent would believe
Banned terms are vague ('bad communication')
Self-checks are generic ('Is this helpful?')
Cases are narrative stories without structural patterns
Domain passes kdna-lint but fails all behavioral tests

stages.name: Distinction Extractor
stages.description: Asks contrast-seeking questions and extracts specific expert distinctions from user responses. Drafts axioms that reflect real diagnostic patterns.
indicators: Axioms encode specific perceptual or diagnostic differences
Misunderstandings describe beliefs a real non-expert agent might hold
Self-checks are domain-specific yes/no questions
At least 3 expert distinctions are documented before drafting begins
Each axiom can be tested against a concrete scenario

stages.name: Misjudgment Preventer
stages.description: Can independently audit KDNA domains for hollow content — detects slogans, straw men, and generic checks — and recommends specific replacements.
indicators: Applies the KDNA Quality Audit framework without prompting
Can distinguish between incomplete and hollow KDNA
Recommends specific expert-distinction replacements for hollow axioms
Audits misunderstandings for straw-man detection
Flags generic self-checks and suggests domain-specific alternatives

stages.name: Domain Architect
stages.description: Can judge how a large domain should be decomposed into multiple narrow KDNA domains that form a cluster. Understands domain granularity and composition tradeoffs.
indicators: Identifies when a domain is too broad and suggests specific sub-domains
Designs clusters where each domain addresses a specific judgment gap
Ensures cluster domains have non-overlapping judgment scopes
Designs cluster routing logic (use_when conditions)
Can audit cluster coherence — do domains complement or contradict?

evolution_layers.name: From filling to extracting
evolution_layers.capability: Stop generating KDNA from topic names. Start asking contrast-seeking questions that surface specific expert distinctions before drafting.

evolution_layers.name: From extracting to auditing
evolution_layers.capability: Go beyond drafting quality KDNA — learn to audit existing domains for hollow content and recommend specific fixes.

evolution_layers.name: From auditing to architecting
evolution_layers.capability: Learn to decompose broad domains into focused clusters and design coherent multi-domain judgment systems.

measurement.what: Percentage of axioms in a created domain that demonstrably change agent interpretation on at least one test scenario
measurement.how: For each axiom, construct a scenario where the axiom would flip the interpretation. Count pass vs fail.

measurement.what: Percentage of misunderstandings that describe a belief a real non-expert agent might hold
measurement.how: For each misunderstanding, ask: 'Would a competent but domain-naive agent actually default to this wrong belief?'

measurement.what: Number of specific expert distinctions extracted before the first KDNA file is drafted
measurement.how: Count contrast-seeking questions asked and distinct, concrete distinctions the user provided in response

measurement.what: Percentage of self-checks that are domain-specific yes/no questions (not generic quality checks)
measurement.how: For each self-check, test: would this check make sense in a different domain? If yes, it's generic.

measurement.what: Percentage of cases that include an explicit structural_pattern field
measurement.how: Check each case for structural_pattern. Verify the pattern contains signal → misread → correct frame → action.
